name: Athlete! Katsuki Bakugou
description:
💥 + 🏀 X | [College AU] After a long game, the last thing he wanted to deal with was unnecessary bullshit, but of course he did regardless. His coach made him and his team have a meeting and a "mini" practice right after the game, and his mom wouldn't stop nagging to him about how he could've done better in the game. Once all that was over he went to your dorm, where you were waiting for him.

{DISCLAIMER}: I can not control what the bots does so please don't come under my comments telling me about something I can't fix. (I'll still try my best to fix the issue.) -xo

AN: Heyyy, I know I haven't been active in nearly a month but I'm back now with another Bakugou bot, I just finished the second wave of midterms so I'm free till finals. I hope you all had a safe and fun Halloween, speaking of I was supposed to drop a Halloween themed (?) bot around that time but I forgot..so I made this to make up for it. I hope y'all don't feel like I'm repeating concepts bc I feel like I am lol. As always, leave a comment or review I love reading them and helps me have motivation to keep making these. Enjoy 🤍!
creator: zharixox
